title: Finite QR Decomposition Checks

solver_reuse.target: finite QR bad product-entry QF_LRA/Farkas regression seed
solver_reuse.pressure: Exact QR replay computes the bottom-right entry of Q*R as 2/5 while a malformed row claims 1/2, isolating a compact equality conflict for the Farkas route.
solver_reuse.next_step: Promote additional exact factorization rows only when they add distinct matrix-product, orthogonality, least-squares, or residual solver pressure; keep QR existence, algorithm correctness, conditioning, and floating-point stability in theorem or numerical-honesty lanes.

graduation_criteria: Encode the fixed rational Q matrix, R matrix, product matrix, orthogonality identity, and triangularity fact as deterministic exact-rational replay obligations.
Route the false product-entry row through a source-linked QF_LRA artifact and checked Farkas evidence after exact replay computes the conflicting entry.
Expose the pack through the matrix computation learner and consumer query surfaces.
Keep QR existence, QR algorithm correctness, least-squares theorem use, floating-point conditioning, and stability claims marked Lean or numerical-honesty horizon.
